TypeSignature.Value: .class public sequential ansi sealed beforefieldinit SKWebpEncoderFrame extends System.ValueType

Docs.summary: Represents a single frame of an animated WebP image, consisting of a pixmap and a display duration.

MemberSignature.Value: .method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor(class SkiaSharp.SKBitmap bitmap, valuetype System.TimeSpan duration) cil managed

Docs.param: The bitmap containing the frame's pixel data.
The display duration for this frame.
Docs.summary: Initializes a new instance of from the specified bitmap and duration.

MemberSignature.Value: .method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor(class SkiaSharp.SKImage image, valuetype System.TimeSpan duration) cil managed

Docs.param: The raster-backed image containing the frame's pixel data.
The display duration for this frame.
Docs.summary: Initializes a new instance of from the specified image and duration.

MemberSignature.Value: .method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor(class SkiaSharp.SKPixmap pixmap, valuetype System.TimeSpan duration) cil managed

Docs.param: The pixmap containing the frame's pixel data.
The display duration for this frame.
Docs.summary: Initializes a new instance of from the specified pixmap and duration.
Gets or sets the display duration for this frame.
Docs.value: The amount of time this frame is displayed.

Docs.summary: Gets or sets the pixmap containing this frame's pixel data.
Docs.value: The pixel data for this frame.
